text: Computer Vision is a fascinating field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to see and understand images. Two important tasks in computer vision are image recognition, which identifies what is in a picture, and object detection, which locates specific items within an image. These technologies have many applications in our daily lives. For example, social media platforms use image recognition to suggest tags for photos. More impressively, object detection is crucial for self-driving cars. These vehicles use cameras and computer vision algorithms to identify pedestrians, traffic signs, and other cars on the road. This helps them make safe driving decisions and avoid accidents. As computer vision improves, we will see even more exciting uses in medicine, security, and robotics.
